entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Niulize maswali kabla ya kueleza mengi sana."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Kagua jibu langu kabla ya kutoa lako."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Nipe toleo gumu zaidi baada ya kujaribu."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Liweke rafiki kwa anayeanza."

entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Gharama ya fursa"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Je, kampuni inapaswa kuingia katika soko hili?"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Tumia mifano kutoka mtihani wangu, mradi wangu, au maisha yangu ya kila siku."

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Ni nini hufanya hoja kuwa ya kweli?"

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Vidokezo vya AI

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Omba kazi ndogo ya kwanza.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Malizia kwa muhtasari unaouandika mwenyewe.

entries.source: For Socratic Instruction, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Kwa Socratic Instruction, mzunguko wa mazoezi wenye manufaa ni:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jifunze kupitia maswali yaliyolenga, vidokezo, na tafakari badala ya kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Misingi

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Vidokezo vizuri kwa kawaida hujumuisha mambo matatu: somo, kiwango chako cha sasa, na aina ya msaada unaotaka. Huhitaji maneno kamili. Unahitaji tu muktadha wa kutosha ili kipindi kianze.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Ikiwa jibu linahisi pana sana, lipunguze. Omba mfano mmoja, dhana moja potofu, swali moja la ukaguzi, au hatua moja inayofuata. Ikiwa linahisi rahisi mno, omba changamoto. Ikiwa linahisi gumu mno, omba daraja kutoka unachojua tayari.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Fanya matokeo yawe na manufaa zaidi

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Socratic Instruction on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Socratic Instruction kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Kusoma jibu la AI si sawa na kujifunza. Baada ya jibu la kwanza, iombe hali hiyo ikufanye ufanye kitu na wazo hilo.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Njia zinazohusiana za kujifunza

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Omba mrejesho kuhusu sehemu iliyohisi haina uhakika.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Jibu kabla ya kuomba suluhisho.

entries.source: Socratic Instruction prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Socratic Instruction

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Anza na ombi moja lililo wazi

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Taja lengo kwa sentensi moja.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ujuzi wa kusoma

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Muhtasari huo wa mwisho ni muhimu. Unapolieleza wazo tena, unaonyesha kilicho imara na kilichoazimwa bado kutoka kwa AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Vipindi bora vya kujifunza vinaweza kurekebishwa. Mkufunzi huuliza swali moja kwa wakati, husubiri hoja zako, na hufanya usanisi tu baada ya wewe kujaribu.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Socratic Instruction is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Njia ya haraka zaidi ya kupata thamani kutoka Socratic Instruction ni kuipa AI kazi ya kujifunza, si mada tu. Mada husema unachokipenda. Kazi ya kujifunza husema aina ya msaada unaohitaji.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Kisha ongeza kizuizi kinachofanya kipindi kiwe cha kibinafsi zaidi:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Jaribu vianzio hivi:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Geuza hali kuwa mazoezi

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Learn Anything. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Tumia Socratic Instruction wakati hii ndiyo hali inayofaa kwa kazi hiyo. Ukitaka njia inayohusiana, jaribu Learn Anything. Unaweza pia kuvinjari blogu ya kujifunza kwa AI kwa mbinu za kusoma, kujifunza kwa Kisokrati, flashcards, uigizaji wa majukumu, na kukumbuka kwa bidii.
